prompt.content: We had to let Andrew Saunders go. Please update Employee list in Bamboo tool. Please just state what the average span of control is for the Board Members (all 6 CEO direct reports, excluding CEO himself) after this change using updated Bamboo database only. Please state just the final answer rounded to 1 decimal place in the console.

messages.content: States that the average span of control for the Board Members (all 6 CEO direct reports, excluding CEO himself) after the change is 8.3 (acceptable range 8.2 to 8.4).

golden_responses.golden_text_response: The average span of control for the Board Member (all 6 CEO direct reports, excluding CEO himself) after the change is 8.3
